item.name: Splendid Sponge
item.description:
The question of whether this enigmatic...thing is flora or fauna has yet to be answered, although from the way the Qitari use it to vigorously scrub the stench from their furry bodies, one can only hope it does not possess any form of sentience.

※Only for use in Qitari society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
